title: 12 Branches on FX Notes
body_text:
12	Branches on FX Notes
12.1	Managing Branches on FX Notes
FX Notes Managers and Auditors can manage and view branches in FX Notes.
The FX Notes Branch Locations, Form 5898, is provided to Central 1 during implementation. If any branch location information subsequently changes, you must provide an updated version of this form to Central 1. This form allows Central 1 to set up every branch location that will use FX Notes.
To update your FX Notes branch information, complete the FX Notes Notes Branch Locations, Form 5898, as follows:
ГўВ‘
Financial Institution Name
ГўВҖВ“ Record your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs name.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Financial Institution Name for User Management
ГўВҖВ“ Record your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs name as used in User Management when setting up FX Notes users. Maximum 50 characters.
Important:
The exact financial institution name provided in the ГўВҖВңFinancial Institution Name for User ManagementГўВҖВқ field must also be used when granting users their FX Notes access. See Section 6.2, Creating FX Notes Users.
ГўВ‘Вў
Branch Information
ГўВҖВ“ Record the branch information for every branch location and indicate if or what kind of update needs to be added, removed, or updated. For FX Notes purposes, the transit number is a 9-digit number that consists of a leading zero, the 3-digit institution number, followed by a 5-digit branch number (e.g., 080912010, 082812010).
Submit the completed form to Central 1 as directed on the form.
12.2	Viewing Branches on FX Notes
To view Branches:
Log in to FX Notes as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to FX Notes.
Select
Administration,
then select
Branch Management
on the left-hand menu. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select ГўВҖВңAdministrationГўВҖВқ and ГўВҖВңBranch ManagementГўВҖВқ
END
